creator: supportsobaka@mail.ru
text: It doesn't work for me. Anyway it would be a workaround if it would work. The problem has nothing with permissions on dataset/mountpoint. They should be kept as the original, owned by root. Manpage clearly indicates that zfs allow should "Delegates ZFS **administration permission** for the file systems to non-privileged users. It's just about *administration permission* that will allow perform some operation by non-priv user for example for clone/remote backup scenarios. Everything else regard zfs allow works as expected but mount. So it's definitely a bug of implementation.
